$$\frac{1}{3^x-1}+\frac{9^x\cdot 9^\frac{1}{2}-3^x\cdot 3^3+3}{3^x-9}\geq 3^x\cdot 3\\ 3^x=t,t>0\\ \frac{1}{t-1}+\frac{3t^2-27t+3}{t-9}-3t\geq 0\\ \frac{1}{t-1}+3t+\frac{3}{t-9}-3t\geq 0\\ \frac{t-9+3t-3}{(t-1)(t-9)}\geq 0\\ \frac{t-3}{(t-1)(t-9)}\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} t >1\\ t\leq 3 \end{cases}\\ \ \ t >9 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 3^{x} >1\\ \ 3\leq 3 \end{cases}\\ \ \ 3^{x} >3^{2} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 3^{x} >1\\ 3^{x} \leq 3 \end{cases}\\ \ \ 3^{x} >3^{2} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x >0\\ x\leq 1 \end{cases}\\ \ \ x >2 \end{array} \right.$$
$$x\in (0;1]\cup (2;+\infty)$$
Ответ: \(x\in ( 0;1] \cup ( 2;+\infty )\).
